item.title: Download TimVer 0.11.0
item.description: TimVer will display the same Windows version-related information as the built-in Winver command, along with additional information that Winver does not display. With TimVer, you can gain deeper insight into your version of Windows, which can help troubleshoot problems and ensure software and hardware compatibility. It retrieves display information from Environment, Windows Management Information (WMI) and Windows registry at HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion. It is...
